name: Cinnamon-Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
For a large (1 1/2 pound) loaf.
Combine all ingredients except raisins in the order given in the machine.
Use the nut/fruit setting and add the raisins when the machine chimes.
If the raisins do not mix into the dough properly, try dusting them lightly with flour next time.
Note: For a different flavor profile, consider using dates instead of raisins.
